goal: Pure-numpy speaker classifier as barge-in tiebreaker. scripts/conduit_tui/speaker_id.py extracts 29-dim features (13 MFCC + 13 delta-MFCC + F0 via autocorr + spectral centroid + ZCR) using only numpy — same DSP foundation as Resemblyzer/SpeechBrain, no torch. SpeakerClassifier.classify returns (user|bot|unknown, margin). Auto-enrolls bot from the decoded TTS PCM on first turn (slice the middle 1.5s); auto-enrolls user from the AEC-cleaned mic ring buffer on first is_final. User template persists at ~/.conduit/voiceprint_user.npy. Orchestrator maintains a 1.5s mic ring buffer and calls _classify_recent_speech() in _handle_dg_partial — if the partial's underlying audio classifies as bot, barge is suppressed. Bias firmly toward 'allow barge' when uncertain. SPEAKER_MARGIN_THRESHOLD env knob (default 0.005).
